meta.scenario: deep house A to B relative major same BPM, mood brightening minor to major
meta.t2_artist: Jerome Sydenham & Kerri Chandler Feat. Troy Denari

transition_arc: 5A (C#m) to 5B (Eb major) — minor to relative major. Mood brightening. Same BPM (123). T1 from_bar=8 skips sparse 8-bar intro. T2 from_bar=0 genuine percussion-only intro. Groove exit at bar 64 (56 bars played after skipping 8). Minor to major lifts energy and feel despite no BPM change.

annotated_actions.t1_state: T1 bar 8: first full groove bar, C#m house groove, kick+bass+chords, RMS 0.47
T1 bar 72 (play bar 64 + from_bar 8): groove, drums=0.55, harmonic=0.45, rms=0.44
annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 0: light kick+hi-hat intro, bass=0.0, harmonic=0.1, rms=0.20
annotated_actions.why: T1 at steady groove, not at peak. Minor to major relative move means harmonic blending safe throughout. Exit at play bar 64 is track bar 72 = 9 x 8 clean phrase boundary.

annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 0: kick present from bar 0 (drums=0.5), bass=0.0 for first 8 bars, major pads starting
annotated_actions.why: T2 from_bar=0: genuine groove intro with kick active immediately. other:0.6 brings T2 Eb major chords — relative major shares all notes with C#m. Mood brightening starts immediately.

annotated_actions.t1_state: T1 play bar 72: bass=0.20, drums=0.28 — fading
annotated_actions.why: T2 bass has entered. Swap removes T1 bass. The major Eb bass replacing T1 minor C# bass is the defining moment of the mood lift.

annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 16: full groove, Eb major, kick+bass+bright chords, RMS 0.52
annotated_actions.why: T2 full groove at same BPM. Mood lifted — minor to major transition complete.
